description: Canonical field contract every vertical entity (order, opportunity, case, ticket, claim, etc.) must include. Vertical-specific fields extend this, they do not replace it. See runtime/kernel/canonical-core.js for the enforcement layer.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the entity, unique within its type.

type.description: Entity type, e.g. 'o2c_order', 'crm_opportunity'. Used for cross-vertical routing.

vertical.description: Which War Room / vertical owns this entity.

owner.description: Person or lane responsible for moving this entity forward.

status.description: Free-text or vertical-defined lifecycle status label.

current_stage.description: Stage id within the vertical's own stage model, e.g. o2c-model.json stages[].id.

risk_level.description: Normalized risk tier. WIP task board and Collective BNCA both render this generically.

sla_state.description: Normalized SLA status. Populate this from vertical-specific breach logic (e.g. O2CEngine.getSlaBreaches()).

linked_war_room.description: Path to the entryPoint war room HTML for this entity, so cross-vertical views (Collective BNCA, WIP) can route back to source.

explicitly_not_canonical.note: These stay vertical-specific by design. Do not hoist into the canonical core -- doing so recreates the bloated-shared-object anti-pattern.
